entities.name: SUB-SAHARAN AFRICA
entities.description: A region in Africa experiencing climate change-related effects on agriculture.

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: Environmental shifts causing impacts on agricultural systems.

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL MODEL INTERCOMPARISON AND IMPROVEMENT PROJECT
entities.description: An international project (AgMIP) advancing research on integrated regional assessments of climate change.

entities.name: INTEGRATED REGIONAL ASSESSMENTS
entities.description: Assessments that integrate climate, crop, and economic modeling and analysis.

entities.name: CLIMATE MODELING
entities.description: The use of models to analyze climate patterns and changes.

entities.name: CROP MODELING
entities.description: The use of models to analyze crop growth and responses.

entities.name: ECONOMIC MODELING
entities.description: The use of models to analyze the economic impacts of climate change.

entities.name: EAST AFRICA
entities.description: A region in Sub-Saharan Africa where regional research teams are centered.

entities.name: WEST AFRICA
entities.description: A region in Sub-Saharan Africa where regional research teams are centered.

entities.name: SOUTHERN AFRICA
entities.description: A region in Sub-Saharan Africa where regional research teams are centered.

entities.name: ADAPTATION
entities.description: The process of adjusting agricultural systems to the impacts of climate change.

entities.name: REPRESENTATIVE AGRICULTURAL PATHWAYS
entities.description: Tools used to inform decision-making and evaluate agricultural systems.

entities.name: CAPACITY BUILDING
entities.description: The process of training scientists and experts in integrated assessment.

entities.name: INTEGRATED ASSESSMENT
entities.description: A methodology for evaluating complex systems, including climate and agriculture.
